summary: Comprehensive testing of wedding management app completed. Backend APIs tested with 88.9% success rate. Frontend public and admin flows fully functional with smooth user experience and proper backend integration.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized requests
minor_bugs.impact: No functional impact - authentication works correctly

minor_bugs.issue: Logout redirect behavior unclear - may not return to login page consistently

design_feedback.feedback: Beautiful wedding-themed design following design guidelines perfectly. Proper use of Cormorant Garamond typography, pastel colors (blue royal, gold, sage), and elegant spacing

passed_tests: Multi-step RSVP form (3 steps with validation)
RSVP form submission and backend integration
Gifts and vaquinhas page with tab navigation
